label: About
title: About Playable Civic Engraving
short_blurb: A daily generated front page where the image is the interface.
body: Daily Frontpage is a daily generated interactive front page. Each edition starts from recent saved signals and source research, becomes a new image-led scene, and stays explorable in the archive. The image is the interface: visible marks, objects, and surfaces in the scene open the real sources that shaped the day.

This iteration began with 14 recent saved-signal files and 14 captured links, then narrowed the page to 9 source windows around @GoogleMagenta: Introducing Magenta RealTime 2 (MRT2): the live music model you can play as an... and @emilkowalski: To get good animations from an AI you need to get good at telling it what you..., plus 7 more. A source image from animationresources.org helped set the palette, contrast, edge behavior, and gesture. The scene became Playable Civic Engraving: Create one dense engraved civic plan on warm parchment, seen as a slightly tilted field rather than a room. Use disciplined black crosshatching, curling cloudlike edges, and hard ink borders from the reference, but turn the scene into a playable town square for machine music, voice, motion, housing, archives, and ci... After the image was made, a plate-reading pass mapped 9 visible regions and the mask audit tightened them against curved glass waveform facade, sweeping elevated causeway bands, and oval acoustic aperture.

typography.rationale: Bricolage Grotesque and Space Grotesk fit record, arcade, and listening-room editions while Fraunces keeps source captions tactile.
